testcase.name: test_runs_recent
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_agents_regression.py:104: in test_runs_recent assert r.status_code == 200, r.text[:300] E AssertionError: {"success":false,"error":"invalid input syntax for type json"} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_fetch_url_public

failure.message:
AssertionError: Error 
Cannot POST /api/agents/tools/fetch-url
assert 404 == 200 + where 404 = .status_code

testcase.failure:
backend/tests/test_agents_regression.py:135: in test_fetch_url_public assert r.status_code == 200, r.text[:300] E AssertionError: E E E E Error E E E 
Cannot POST /api/agents/tools/fetch-url
E E E E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = .status_code

testcase.name: test_fetch_url_bad_input

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 400 for bad URL, got 404 assert 404 == 400 + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_agents_regression.py:148: in test_fetch_url_bad_input assert r.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400 for bad URL, got {r.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 400 for bad URL, got 404 E assert 404 == 400 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_no_html_crash_get

failure.message: AssertionError: 500 HTML / bad status: /api/agents/runs/recent -> unexpected 500 /api/agents/platform/quotes -> exception HTTPSConnectionPool(host='smart-business-sigma.vercel.app', port=443): Read timed out. (read timeout=25) /api/agents/platform/invoices -> exception HTTPSConnectionPool(host='smart-business-sigma.vercel.app', port=443): Read timed out. (read timeout=25) assert not ['/api/agents/runs/recent -> unexpected 500', "/api/agents/platform/quotes -> exception HTTPSConnectionPool(host='smart-business-sigma.vercel.app', port=443): Read timed out. (read timeout=25)", "/api/agents/platform/invoices -> exception HTTPSConnectionPool(host='smart-business-sigma.vercel.app', port=443): Read timed out. (read timeout=25)"]

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_agents_regression.py:255: in test_no_html_crash_get assert not failures, "500 HTML / bad status:\n" + "\n".join(failures) E AssertionError: 500 HTML / bad status: E /api/agents/runs/recent -> unexpected 500 E /api/agents/platform/quotes -> exception HTTPSConnectionPool(host='smart-business-sigma.vercel.app', port=443): Read timed out. (read timeout=25) E /api/agents/platform/invoices -> exception HTTPSConnectionPool(host='smart-business-sigma.vercel.app', port=443): Read timed out. (read timeout=25) E assert not ['/api/agents/runs/recent -> unexpected 500', "/api/agents/platform/quotes -> exception HTTPSConnectionPool(host='smart-business-sigma.vercel.app', port=443): Read timed out. (read timeout=25)", "/api/agents/platform/invoices -> exception HTTPSConnectionPool(host='smart-business-sigma.vercel.app', port=443): Read timed out. (read timeout=25)"]

testcase.name: test_extract_to_crm_leads_from_text
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_agents_regression.py:304: in test_extract_to_crm_leads_from_text assert r.status_code in (200, 500) E assert 404 in (200, 500) E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
